untranslatable_reason: Signal requires options-specific indicators not available in backtester: (1) Days to expiration tracking, (2) Option moneyness/strike relationship to underlying, (3) Implied Volatility (IV) vs Historical Volatility (HV) comparison, (4) At-The-Money (ATM) status detection, (5) Gamma measurement. The core thesis about volatility timing relative to option expiration cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators (moving averages, RSI, ATR, etc.). This signal requires an options pricing framework and Greeks calculation.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_184_0 is a sophisticated options volatility timing concept that depends on: (a) days remaining to expiration as a critical state variable, (b) implied volatility percentile ranking, (c) option moneyness band definition. None of these are available in the provided indicator set. The signal is untranslatable to equity price action indicators. To implement this strategy, an options-specific backtester with IV term structure, option Greeks, and expiration tracking would be required.
